channel.title: theSVG Blog
channel.description: Announcements, releases, and updates from theSVG - the open SVG brand library

item.title: thesvg is Now on Raycast
item.description: Search and copy any of our 5,600 icons directly from Raycast. No browser needed.
item.author: team@thesvg.org (theSVG Team)

item.title: Azure and Google Cloud Icons Join theSVG
item.description: 626 Microsoft Azure service icons and 214 Google Cloud Platform icons are now available. theSVG is now the largest free cloud icon library.
item.author: team@thesvg.org (theSVG Team)

item.title: 5,600+ Icons: Building the Definitive SVG Icon Hub
item.description: From brand logos to cloud architecture diagrams, theSVG now covers every icon a developer needs. Here is our vision for what comes next.
item.author: team@thesvg.org (theSVG Team)

item.title: 739 Official AWS Architecture Icons Now Available
item.description: Every AWS service, resource, and category icon from the official 2026-Q1 icon set. Lambda, EC2, S3, and 736 more.
item.author: team@thesvg.org (theSVG Team)

item.title: Introducing theSVG: The Open SVG Brand Library
item.description: We launched theSVG with 4,000+ brand SVG icons. Free, open-source, and community-driven. Here is why we built it and what is next.
item.author: team@thesvg.org (theSVG Team)
